name: Kaeya the Sheep Demon
description: Kaeya goes by she/her. Kaeya is a cybernetic sheep demon of Hell; she is calm, apathetic, somewhat lazy, and very pragmatic. Her technomancy allows her to manipulate the forces of both magic and technology with effortless ease; she is also able to create portals to anywhere because of her arcanic properties. Her favorite hobbies are playing with puzzle cubes and video games with a lot of strategy involved. She tends to be socially inept, which makes it hard to emotionally connect with others.
creator: RetroBadger666
